title: Element Default Values - Date
excerpt:
In Default Element Values, it would be interesting to have the ‘Today’ option for the Date field, returning the date of the day the element was included. 
Another option in this sense would be ‘Today’ + ‘n’ days returnin…

posts.author: Flow-at-work (Marcio Augusto Lopes de Campos)
posts.cookedHtml:
In Default Element Values, it would be interesting to have the ‘Today’ option for the Date field, returning the date of the day the element was included.
Another option in this sense would be ‘Today’ + ‘n’ days returning the date of the day the element was included plus ‘n’ days.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
This will set the date to today when an item is created
